welcomeSignup: Welcome. You are only a few steps away from registering as a ComOn member. You have been invited on your telephone number and will be registered with it.
mandatorySignupFields: Please fill in the fields marked with an asterisk and enter a password you can easily remember.
passwordCharacterstics: The password must be in English or Latin characters only. It should be at least 6 characters long and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character (e.g., !@#$%^&*()-_+.=).
goodluck: We are happy to have you in the ComOn community.
agreeTermsAndCondition: You must agree to become a ComOn member
contactDisclosure: ComOn enhances your Chat experience by syncing contacts for personalized user names. Your contacts stay on our server, serving only you, and never shared externally. Please click on ok to proceed
mediaDisclosure:
ComOn enriches your Chat experience with personalized media sharing. Your images and videos stay within ComOn, shared only in your individual and group chatrooms, and are never shared externally.

 How ComOn uses and share your media:

‣ Share Images and Videos: Enhance your communication with personalized media sharing.
‣ Capture Photos and Videos: Enjoy a seamless camera experience within ComOn.
‣ Your Media: Processed on our secure server exclusively for your chats.
‣ No Third-Party Sharing: Your media is shared only within ComOn, respecting your privacy.
invitation: Send an invitation to become a ComOn member
invitationSuggestion: Please choose a contact and press on the invite button. The contact is marked to be invited. You will invite the contact by any other message app your contact is using too.
linkShare:
Hello 👋, I'm sending a link for an impressive app. ComOn communicates securely and encrypted with each other and allows tasks - even in large teams - to be created and edited in a traceable way.

Click here to download:

task-list-footer.usage-guide-content: Choose task components to build your Task: Use Like/Dislike for quick feedback, Yes/No for confirmations, Free Text for detailed responses, Numeric for ratings and measurements, Multiple Options for surveys and selections, and Media Upload for collecting photos, documents, or videos. Combine different components in sequence to create comprehensive data collection flows that guide users through structured processes while gathering the specific information you need.
